### Why choose us

- Published: 2025-02-17
- Modified: 2026-03-03
- URL: https://cleaningservice4u.com/why-choose-us/

PROFESSIONAL CLEANING SERVICE 4U Contact us Why choose us WHY CHOOSE "CLEANING SERVICE 4U" FOR YOUR HOUSE CLEANING IN GALVESTON COUNTY AND SOUTH HOUSTON: Trained, vetted and insured cleaners. Same cleaner every time. Security! All our cleaners are trained into safe key-holding. We will never have your keys with the address held on one place and if we lose your keys we will pay for new ones to be cut. Immediate cleaner replacement in case of holidays, sickness etc. Non minimum term contract Convenience! Various payment methods. Pay only when using the service. Discounts on all other services: End of tenancy cleaning, Spring cleaning, After builders cleaning and House removal services. VETTING Our domestic cleaners are vetted carefully to ensure that a cleaner will stay with you for a good period of time. Our vetting is carefully done to ensure that a cleaner will stay with you for a good period of time. We know that it takes a lot to allow a stranger into your premises hence the reason why we make all the adequate steps to guarantee the peace of mind of our clients by ensuring that all our cleaners are full vetted. THE VETTING PROCEDURES INCLUDES: Identification. References Our vetting manager has gone through an advance training course to ensure that the references are genuine and that the referees are giving a true and honest appraisal of the applicant. Proof of address. Next of kin details We ensure that the details of the applicant’s next of kin...

And just because we work also in the big area like: South Houston, Pasadena, Friendswood, League City, Pearland, Alvin, Seabrook, Kemah, Dickinson, Texas City, etc. – this doesn’t mean congested services and steep prices! ### Spring cleaning

- Published: 2025-01-30
- Modified: 2026-03-03
- URL: https://cleaningservice4u.com/spring-cleaning/

PROFESSIONAL CLEANING SERVICE 4U Contact us Spring cleaning Do you like to do spring cleaning? Most people don’t. The stress about what to do first and wasting a whole day doing stuff you hate to do. But doesn’t it feel great when you’re done your spring cleaning. The house smells great, it looks great and you feel proud about your home. Spring is the time to get your house clean of the winter dust and germs. Let us come in and do a total top to bottom cleaning for you. We will dust and polish your furniture, clean your bathrooms and kitchen, baseboards, ceiling fans. We use a reputable linen service to make sure the cloths we use to clean your home are clean, disinfected and sanitised. Why do we go thru all this trouble for you? We can sum it up in two words “dust mites”. There are millions of them in your home and probably the worst allergen. . Spring cleaning Let’s work together to keep your family healthy! NOW think about how you would feel knowing that you can go out with your family one day, and when you get back your entire spring cleaning is DONE! We can make it happen for you. We can even leave behind fresh flowers as a finishing touch. Carpet steam cleaning, upholstery cleaning and curtains steam cleaning are not included but could be arranged on request. Please call us on +1 409 354 1122 for a FREE no obligation estimate...

### Move in and move out

- Published: 2025-01-28
- Modified: 2026-03-03
- URL: https://cleaningservice4u.com/move-in-and-move-out/

PROFESSIONAL CLEANING SERVICE 4U Contact us Move in and move out cleaning End of Tenancy Cleaning know as Move Out. (We do also Move In) Tenancy coming to an end? House still a mess? Don’t panic, with “Cleaning Service 4U” you needn’t worry about cleaning to keep your deposit, as this Galveston County and South Houston cleaning company, will take care of everything, and probably do a better job than you could ever hope to achieve. They’ll clean every nook and cranny of the house you’re moving from and complete it within a day, pre or post tenancy! Your end of tenancy cleaning will be tackled by a skilled mobile team, who have the most effective methods to get a house to tip top shape, and all the necessary products, equipment and tools in place, so you don’t have to get anything ready. The mobile team are dedicated to their job, and will have the best tools to see the job through. We know the checks that take place when it comes to moving out and have a checklist which is in line with what estate agencies and landlords expect when they come to inspect. Our cleaners stick to the requirements for inventory checkouts, and we guarantee you that nothing will be missed. Our list is up to date with the cleanliness standards expected by major letting agents on this area. End of Tenancy Cleaning Cleaning stuff Cleaning service TexasEfficiency is key to our work, and each step of the...

### After builders cleaning

- Published: 2025-01-28
- Modified: 2026-03-03
- URL: https://cleaningservice4u.com/after-builders/

PROFESSIONAL CLEANING SERVICE 4U Contact us After builders cleaning After builders cleaning residential Home renovation and decorating always causes a lot dust and dirt. At “Cleaning Service 4U” we have a team of After builders cleaners who specialise only with after builders cleaning. We will leave your home nice and tidy, just the way you want it. In a few hours your property will be spotless and sparkle. We have designed a thorough task list, which will cover every corner in your home. You can also provide your own list of requirements, so we can target the areas of your house that you the most concern. The exceptional standard and the guaranteed quality help us to succeed and to develop a wide range of cleaning services. We know it is important for you that your house is spotless and we work hard to achieve outstanding results every time we clean your home. After builders cleaning Please find below our task list: ● Clean all skirting and doors. ● Cleaning services Galveston TXHoover and mop all floors and stairs. ● Clean all sockets and switches. ● Clean all windows, window sills from inside. ● Clean all kitchen, bedroom, living room and etc. cupboards/wardrobes inside and out. ● Clean & polish all kitchen, bedroom, living room and etc. surfaces and wooden works. ● Clean all skirting boards ● Clean & polish bathrooms/toilets. ● Wash the tiles and all basins in the bathroom. ● Make sure all the property is dust free. You need a office cleaning service that views its customers as lifetime partners and delivers dependable quality service at all times. At Cleaning Service 4U we understand the cleaning problems that office and property managers face today. We have created a program that addresses all of your cleaning concerns. Our goal is to exceed your cleaning standards, and to free up the time you spend on cleaning issues for more important business matters. Discounts on all other services: End of tenancy cleaning, Spring cleaning, After builders cleaning and House removal services. Our vetting is carefully done to ensure that a cleaner will stay with you for a good period of time. References Our vetting manager has gone through an advance training course to ensure that the references are genuine and that the referees are giving a true and honest appraisal of the applicant. ### Home

- Published: 2020-02-24
- Modified: 2026-03-03
- URL: https://cleaningservice4u.com/

PROFESSIONAL CLEANING SERVICE 4U Contact us Professional cleaning service Whether you need a reliable domestic cleaner, or are looking for a thorough workplace cleanse, here at "Cleaning Service 4U" we have the service to suit your needs; for both personal properties and business premises. Our highly-efficient mobile teams cover Galveston County and surrounding areas, delivering complete cleaning at competitive rates. And just because we work also in the big area like South Houston, Pasadena, Friendswood, League City, Pearland, Alvin, Seabrook, Kemah, Dickinson, Texas City, etc. – this doesn’t mean congested services and steep prices! Instead you can expect efficiency and a great value for money: Customer satisfaction matters greatly to us, and that’s why we co-ordinate or cleaning times and services to suit you. Tailoring what we do to suit your budget, timescale and aspirations, as closely as possible, is important to us. Here at "Cleaning Service 4U" we have an established network of satisfied clients who regularly return to using our services. We have professional teams capable of cleaning every aspect of your home; from the kitchen to the bathroom. You can expect a revitalised feel and a thorough job – as we take great care to achieve a result in your home you are happy with. We are also recognised for the efficiency of our office cleaning services. For many years we’ve been using the latest techniques and quality equipment to keep a variety of workspaces fresh and functional. This ensures an office which is a pleasure to...
